blocking_findings: delayed-exit repair is partial because unresolved exits after the max delay are still NaN and later dropped
exit fillability does not yet include suspension, exit-day volume or amount, ST transition, or delisting checks

add exit fillability checks for suspension, zero or low volume, low amount, ST transitions, and delisting
